channel.title: self-evaluation on DANIELLE COSME
channel.description: Recent content in self-evaluation on DANIELLE COSME

item.title: Neural correlates of self-evaluation during puberty
item.description:
Citation:
Barendse, M. E. A., Cosme, D., Flournoy, J. C., Vijayakumar, N., Cheng, T. W., Allen, N. B., & Pfeifer, J.H. (in press) Neural correlates of self-evaluation during puberty. Developmental Cognitive Neuroscience

item.title: If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Ross, G. & Pfeifer, J. H. (In Prep) If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being.
